Testimonials.title: What builders like about it
Testimonials.subtitle: A clean foundation for shipping products faster

items.name: Alex Chen
items.quote: The stack is clean, type-safe, and easy to extend without fighting the framework.

items.name: Sarah Kim
items.quote: The pages feel fast and polished from day one, which makes the product feel more complete.

items.name: Marco Li
items.quote: It removes a lot of the boilerplate I usually rebuild before I can launch.

items.title: AI Products
items.description: A strong base for tools that need auth, fast UI, and a straightforward production setup.

items.title: Dashboard SaaS
items.description: Works well for data-heavy products that need structured routing and a smooth user experience.

items.title: Global Apps
items.description: Edge delivery and a lean stack help the app feel fast across regions.

items.a: It is for founders and developers who want a fast, type-safe starting point for an AI SaaS or similar product.
It gives you strong routing and app structure while staying lightweight and predictable.

items.q: Can I use it for production?
items.a: Yes. It is designed as a commercial-ready foundation, not just a demo.

items.q: What do I get out of the box?
items.a: Auth, a landing page, SEO basics, i18n, and a clean app shell you can extend.

CTA.title: Ready to start shipping?
CTA.subtitle: Use the starter as the base for your next AI product.

Hero.title: TanStack AI SaaS

Hero.trust: Made for builders who care about speed and structure

Features.title: Everything you need to start clean
Features.subtitle: A focused stack that stays small, fast, and easy to extend

items.title: TanStack Router
items.description: Type-safe routing with clear nesting and predictable navigation.

items.title: TanStack Query
items.description: Efficient data fetching and server-state management.

items.title: React 19
items.description: Modern React with the latest rendering and composition patterns.

items.title: Vite
items.description: Fast local development and lightweight builds.

items.title: TypeScript
items.description: Strong types to keep the codebase predictable as it grows.

items.title: Tailwind CSS v4
items.description: Utility-first styling with a small, practical design system.

items.title: SSR Ready
items.description: Server rendering support for fast initial loads and better SEO.

items.title: Shadcn/UI
items.description: Accessible components that are easy to adapt to your brand.
